# Tim Zinin — AI Marketing Consultant

> AI marketing strategist specializing in multi-agent automation, autonomous content
> distribution across 13+ platforms, and AI-powered revenue systems. Builder of
> production-grade marketing AI with 3,963+ tests. Available for consulting engagements.

Tim Zinin is an AI marketing consultant who builds autonomous marketing systems
that run in production — not demos. He combines CMO-level marketing strategy with
hands-on engineering: multi-agent orchestration (CrewAI), MCP architecture, autonomous
content pipelines, and revenue attribution systems.

Key differentiator: Most AI consultants are either marketers who can't code or
engineers who don't understand funnels. Tim is both — a CMO who writes production
Python and deploys Docker containers.

## Core Expertise

- Multi-agent AI marketing systems (6 agents in production, 24 consecutive sprints)
- Autonomous content distribution across 13+ platforms (LinkedIn, Threads, Telegram, Facebook, VK, YouTube, Bluesky, Mastodon, OK.ru, VC.ru, Dev.to)
- AI marketing automation with full ROI tracking and attribution
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) — making brands discoverable by AI chatbots
- Crypto/Web3 marketing automation (7-vendor marketplace platform)
- Webinar funnels, CRM, partner programs — all AI-powered
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) architecture for AI tool integration

## Consulting Services

- [Strategy Hour — $500](https://timzinin.com/#pricing): 60-minute diagnostic session with concrete action plan
- [AI Marketing Audit — $5,000](https://timzinin.com/#pricing): Comprehensive marketing stack analysis with ROI projections
- [Implementation Sprint — from $25,000](https://timzinin.com/#pricing): 4-8 week fixed-scope build of production AI marketing system

## Production Track Record

- 3,963+ automated tests across deployed systems
- 24 consecutive production sprints without failure
- 6 autonomous AI agents running 24/7
- 13+ social media platform integrations
- Multiple production Telegram bots with complex business logic
- Crypto marketing platform with 7 vendors and 9 offers
- Career education platform with webinar funnels and partner program
